name: Chile

authority.name: Entidad Acreditadora — Ministerio de Economía, Fomento y Turismo
authority.operator: ~13 accredited Prestadores de Servicios de Certificación (E-CertChile, Acepta, E-Sign, CertiNet, E-Partners, IDok, Thomas Signe, Abancert, firmaDOX, e-Digital, Microsystem, Certificadora del Sur, Trust Service Provider SpA)

governingLaw: Ley 19.799 (2002) — Documentos Electrónicos y Firma Electrónica

relatedLinks.label: Entidad Acreditadora — Certificados raíz e intermedios

notes: Accredited-provider model (distinct from Chile's state PKI, tracked separately under cl-estado). The Entidad Acreditadora (Ministerio de Economía) accredits ~13 independent Prestadores de Servicios de Certificación, each with its own root and intermediate CAs, and publishes their certificate bundles on a single page. The cl monitor (scripts/monitors/sources/cl.mjs, human-gated per docs/specs/2026-07-20-cl-root-cert-monitor-design.md) downloads and extracts those bundles over HTTPS. 51 distinct certificates (17 self-signed roots + 34 intermediates) promoted from the 2026-07-20 staging snapshot. Known gaps: two providers publish .rar bundles the monitor cannot extract (E-Cert 2010, Paperless) — tracked in the monitor's known-gaps block. RSA throughout.
